description_long: This is a striking sword with a straight, double-edged blade rendered in a deep red color, featuring a marbled or veined pattern along its length. The blade tapers to a sharp point and is complemented by a prominent circular crossguard with two short, outward-facing quillons. The handle is cylindrical, matching the red theme, and ends in a rounded pommel with a decorative tassel or ribbon attached. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suggesting ceremonial or fantasy use. The materials and finish give the sword a polished, slightly glossy appearance, with metallic and possibly synthetic elements.
description: A red, straight-bladed sword with a circular crossguard, marbled pattern, and a decorative tassel on the handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full blade, circular crossguard, and handle with tassel clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the tassel hanging down.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the marbled blade, crossguard, and handle details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and the tassel's position.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, red, with a rounded pommel and attached tassel
attribute_ornamentation: marbled pattern on blade, decorative tassel
